## Automated Tests Required

### S6-02 — R-21 Item Role Restriction — Logic (only if Path A or C chosen)

**Test file path**: `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/RoleRestrictionTests.cs`

**What to test** (Path A only — Path B removes the field entirely):
- `NetworkHeroInventory.AvailableToPurchase(item, hero)` returns `false` when `item.Positions` contains roles AND `hero.Role` is not in the list AND `Role.All` is not in the list
- Returns `true` when `item.Positions.Length == 0` (backward-compat: empty = all roles)
- Returns `true` when `item.Positions.Contains(Role.All)`
- Returns `true` when `item.Positions.Contains(hero.Role)`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty `Positions[]` array
- `Positions[]` containing only `Role.All`
- `Positions[]` containing `hero.Role` + other roles
- `Positions[]` not containing `hero.Role` and not `Role.All` (the blocking case)
- `null` Positions array (defensive — should not throw NRE)
- Each of the 7 Role enum values (All, Tank, Support, Carry, Fighter, Assassin, Mage) tested as hero role

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests (matrix of Role × Positions states)

*Path B (remove field): no new tests — smoke check verifies items still purchase normally; serialization migration covered by Unity loading existing `.asset` files without warnings.*

---

### S6-03..S6-06 — Phase 3 hero migrations — Logic component

**Test file path**: `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/Phase3HeroSlotBindingTests.cs` (one file with class per hero, OR one file per hero — decide on first hero)

**What to test** (per hero, replicating Hercules pattern from S5-04/S5-05/S5-09/S5-21):
- `ActorCombat.OnStartup` reads `CBSUnit.SlotQ[0]..SlotI[0]` aliases and calls `AbilityComponent.BindSlot(slot, abilityId)` × 6 (Q/W/E/R/A/I) + slot 7 Recall global
- `ActorCombat.GetSlotAction(byte slot)` returns the correct action for slot lookup (1=Q, 2=W, 3=E, 4=R, 5=A, 6=I, 7=Recall)
- `ActorCombatAction.IsActiveSlotOwner()` resolves via `BoundSlot` for migrated hero (dual-path: not falling back to legacy SkillKey path when BoundSlot != 0)
- `Progress` setter fires `Actor.Combat.SetActiveSlot(slot)` for both manual press + auto-attack paths (TD-006 regression guard from S5-21)
- `ResolveSlotFromSkillKey` returns expected slot for each SkillKey (already covered by S5-21 `ActorCombatActionSlotResolverTests.cs` — verify still green after each migration)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `BoundSlot == 0` → legacy SkillKey fallback path engaged (regression guard for unmigrated heroes)
- Hero has fewer than 6 abilities defined → BindSlot called only for non-empty slots
- Hero has hardcoded ability id mismatch with CBSUnit → warning logged, fallback to legacy CreateSkill
- `AbilityData == null` → no NRE in Progress setter (S5-21 R3 risk)

**Estimated test count**: ~6-8 unit tests per hero × 4 heroes = **24-32 tests for S6-03..06 combined** (likely shared base class with parameterized fixtures)

*Note: Existing 116 EditMode tests in `Radius.Tests.Characters` from S5 must stay green throughout. Phase 3 heroes add to this count, do not modify it.*

---

### S6-09 — /story-readiness API+caller audit gate — Logic

**Test file path**: `.claude/skills/story-readiness/tests/api-caller-audit-test.md` (skill-spec test, not Unity EditMode)

**What to test**:
- Skill detects "phantom caller" pattern: story AC promises a method/property on module B that does not yet exist in code → verdict BLOCKED with specific gap surfaced
- Skill passes a story where the AC's external caller exists → verdict READY
- Skill ignores AC items that don't reference cross-module callers (pure within-story-scope work)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- AC promises a caller in same module (should not block — internal additions allowed)
- AC promises a caller that exists but in a different namespace/asmdef → still detected
- AC mentions a method by name in prose only (not under "callers" section) → not blocked (avoid false positives)

**Estimated test count**: 3-4 skill-test scenarios

---

### S6-10 — BUG-0003 root-cause regression test (only if fix lands)

**Test file path**: `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/NetworkRunnerInputRegressionTests.cs` (NEW or existing file)

**What to test** (if root-cause fix is the outcome — if "accept band-aid" is the outcome, no test required):
- The original NRE reproduction case from `production/qa/bugs/BUG-0003-network-runner-input-nre.md` no longer throws
- 8 sites that were null-conditionally band-aided still operate correctly with the root fix in place

**Edge cases to cover**: per BUG-0003 reproduction steps

**Estimated test count**: 1-3 tests (one per NRE source path identified)

---

### S6-14 — S5-17 AbilityMultipeerRunner duplicate-Start guard — Logic

**Test file path**: `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/AbilityMultipeerRunnerTests.cs` (NEW)

**What to test**:
- Calling `Start()` twice on AbilityMultipeerRunner does not produce GameIsFull cascade
- Guard logic prevents duplicate runner registration

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Start called from script + from inspector wake
- Start during pre-runner-initialized state

**Estimated test count**: 2 unit tests

---

### S6-B1 — BUG-0004 BotActor.WithTarget regression — Logic

**Test file path**: extend `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/BotActorInputTests.cs` (if exists) or NEW

**What to test**:
- `BotActor.WithTarget(skill)` populates `msg.PressedSlot = skill.BoundSlot` (post-fix, matches `BotActor.Auto` from S5-05)
- Bot input path produces same InputMessage shape as human input path

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `skill.BoundSlot == 0` legacy hero case
- Target null

**Estimated test count**: 2-3 tests

### S6-03..S6-06 — Phase 3 hero migrations (per hero)

**Verification method**: Manual Unity Editor playthrough + multipeer harness
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester (both hats `tanapol`)
**Evidence to capture**: per-hero notes + screenshot in `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md`; multipeer log in `S6-XX-multipeer.txt`

Checklist (per hero):
- [ ] Hero playable in `scene_game_map.unity` — boots without NRE, joins match
- [ ] Q / W / E / R cast → damage, VFX, animation, cooldown all functional
- [ ] Normal Attack (A) chain (Attack_1/2/3) plays correct animation + deals damage
- [ ] Recall returns to fountain correctly
- [ ] Item slot (slot 6) usage works if applicable
- [ ] Console-clean check: 0 `BindSlot not registered` warnings (TD-007 regression guard from S5-10)
- [ ] Console-clean check: 0 `[S5-06] StateReleaseSlot ... slot=0` warnings (TD-006 regression guard from S5-21)
- [ ] Multipeer harness Pass #1-5 green (parity + bandwidth ≤65 B/s)
- [ ] FPS within ±10% of pre-migration baseline for that hero
- [ ] No new error spikes in Editor.log beyond known cosmetic errors (Photon GameIsFull, BUG-0003 NRE band-aid)

### S6-07 — Phase 3 mini-batch playtest gate

**Verification method**: 1-match Training playthrough with 1 of the 4 migrated heroes + multipeer harness across all 4
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] 1-match Training playthrough completes for chosen hero (full match end-to-end)
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs surfaced during the match
- [ ] Multipeer harness rotates all 4 heroes through Pass #1-5 (4 sessions, ≥3 of 4 passing each)
- [ ] Bandwidth ≤65 B/s preserved across all 4 heroes (carry-forward from Phase 2 baseline)
- [ ] Lessons-learned doc `docs/architecture/phase-2-lessons-learned.md` reviewed; if new pattern emerges in Phase 3, append as Pattern #6
- [ ] Sign-off: tanapol (both hats) documented in evidence doc

### S6-13 — PlayMode test framework spike

**Verification method**: Either working test artifact OR decision doc
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer + gameplay-programmer (`tanapol`)
**Evidence to capture**: test file path OR decision doc path

Checklist:

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for Sprint 006:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. Match boots to playable state in `scene_game_map.unity` — Hercules + 1 migrated Phase 3 hero + bot opponent
3. **Phase 3 mini-batch (4 heroes)**: each hero can be selected, cast all abilities, deal damage
4. Multipeer harness completes Pass #1-5 without GameIsFull cascade (S5-17 regression guard if S6-14 lands)
5. No `BindSlot not registered` warnings in Console during match (TD-007 regression guard)
6. No `slot=0` warnings in Console during ability casts (TD-006 regression guard)
7. Bandwidth ≤65 B/s preserved (Phase 2 budget — Phase 3 must not regress)
8. Performance: FPS stays within ±10% of pre-Phase-3 baseline
9. Save / load not applicable for this sprint (no save system changes)

*Smoke tests verified by the developer via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| S6-07 Phase 3 mini-batch gate | Verify 4 migrated heroes play end-to-end without regressions vs. their pre-migration behavior | 1 | experienced (developer dogfooding) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` and signed off by gameplay-programmer + qa-tester (both `tanapol`) before S6-07 can be marked COMPLETE.

*Phase 3 batch 1 is a developer-facing playthrough, not external playtest — purpose is regression detection vs. Phase 2 Hercules baseline. Larger playtest sessions (≥3 sessions per Polish phase requirement) are scheduled for Sprint 009+ when Phase 3 covers ≥10 heroes.*

## Definition of Done — Sprint 006

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, multipeer log, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for Phase 3 hero migrations (S6-03..06, S6-11, S6-12)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced — multipeer Pass #1-5 green; 0 BindSlot / slot=0 warnings
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file / sprint-status.yaml updated to `Status: done` (via `/story-done`)
